title: Image compressor

posts.author: ShellyEldman (Shelly Eldman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey!
for all of you who struggle with image size,
My Name is Shelly and I’m a full stack developer and a Monday.com vendor
I have developed simple automation which decreases immediately the size of the image after uploading it on Monday.

Specific use case:
Ducugen does not allow to upload images above 500K.
When you upload images directly from your mobile, they have very big size ~5M
which causes Docugen (and probably other apps) to ignore them

you can reach me directly here or by email I’ll give you more info
shelyeldman@gmail.com
Shelly

posts.author: abbas (Abbas )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I am in need of it.
I have also emailed you about it.
You can reach me at “abbasjamali2001@gmail.com.”

posts.author: User129438 (John S)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a reason you’re not simply posting a link to the app? I need to utilize this, but I am not sure why there are 2 accounts on Monday posting about this “app” in a cryptic way without sharing how to get it…

posts.author: Ushavilash (Usha Vilash)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @ShellyEldman that great you are the vendor of Monday.com It sounds great that you developed image compression tools but I’m using some online third party application such as https://jpegcompression.com/ it compresses images efficiently without losing their quality so I want try to you tool can you tell us about that.
